title: T-049 — UI parity: OEE, downtime and waste analytics screens
prompt:
# T-049 — UI parity: OEE, downtime and waste analytics screens

PRD/UX refs: SCR-08-04, SCR-08-05, SCR-08-07, prototype labels waste_analytics_screen,downtime_screen,oee_screen,waste_modal,pause_line_modal,resume_line_modal

Goal: Build analytics screens for waste, downtime and OEE with forms/modals matching prototypes.

Implementation details:
Use Next.js App Router Server Components by default, shadcn/ui components, next-intl keys, org-scoped data access, loading/empty/error states, and literal data-prototype-label markers matching _meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-production.json. Closeout must include desktop screenshots and Playwright traces. Match new-screens.jsx:4-209, other-screens.jsx:4-212, modals.jsx:69-117,185-204,328-342. Data comes from T-036/T-037/T-044 and taxonomy T-035/T-045. Charts must have accessible table fallbacks and filter state in URL params.

Scope files:
- apps/web/app/production/oee/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/production/downtime/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/production/waste/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/components/production/downtime-modals.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/new-screens.jsx:4-209
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:4-212

Acceptance criteria:
1. OEE/downtime/waste pages match prototype labels and support filters
2. Pause/resume/log waste modals validate required taxonomy fields
3. Closeout includes screenshots for all three screens and a Playwright trace

Evidence: include screenshots/artifacts and Playwright traces/artifacts for UI/E2E tasks; include API test output for backend tasks.
